_doc: Config for cowork-intelligence Graphify integration v0.3.1. The binary is autodetected (PATH then ~/.local/bin/graphify) but can be pinned here. The script uses real Graphify sub-commands: `graphify update` (fast, no LLM) for projects, `graphify global add` for the user scope. Initial extraction with LLM is `graphify extract <path>` — run it manually once via /cowork-intelligence:cowork-graphify-refresh extract.

user._doc: Paths to register in Graphify's global cross-repo graph. graphify global add is idempotent — registering a path multiple times is safe.
